message:
Improve ChangelogAccordion accessibility and robustness

- Add aria-controls/aria-labelledby for screen reader support
- Add role="region" to expandable content
- Use useMemo to avoid sorting on every render
- Add defensive fallback for unknown entry types
- Use sortedChangelog.length consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
